suite.name: Saucedemo Tests

test.name: TC1 - Valid Login Lands On Products Page

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open the browser and navigate to the Sauce Demo application. Typically used as Test Setup.

kw.name: Login Page Should Be Open
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Verify that the Login page is loaded successfully.

kw.name: Login With Valid Credentials
Login With Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the username into the Username field.

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the password into the Password field.

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the Login button to submit the login form.
Perform login using the provided username and password.
Log in using the valid credentials stored in the configuration file.

kw.name: Products Page Should Be Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify that the Products page is displayed after a successful login.

kw.name: Close Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser after test execution. Test Teardown. Runs regardless of whether the test passes or fails.

test.doc: Verify that a user can successfully log in using valid credentials and reach the Products page.

test.name: TC2 - Invalid Login Shows Error Message

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open the browser and navigate to the Sauce Demo application. Typically used as Test Setup.

kw.name: Login Page Should Be Open
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Verify that the Login page is loaded successfully.

kw.name: Login With Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the username into the Username field.

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the password into the Password field.

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the Login button to submit the login form.
Perform login using the provided username and password.

kw.name: Login Error Should Be Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Verify that an error message appears after an unsuccessful login attempt. All Sauce Demo login errors start with the text "Epic sadface".

kw.name: Close Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser after test execution. Test Teardown. Runs regardless of whether the test passes or fails.

test.doc: Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed when invalid credentials are used.

test.name: TC3 - Add Single Product To Cart

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open the browser and navigate to the Sauce Demo application. Typically used as Test Setup.

kw.name: Login With Valid Credentials
Login With Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the username into the Username field.

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the password into the Password field.

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the Login button to submit the login form.
Perform login using the provided username and password.
Log in using the valid credentials stored in the configuration file.

kw.name: Products Page Should Be Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify that the Products page is displayed after a successful login.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Add a product to the cart using the provided product button locator.

kw.name: Cart Badge Should Show
Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify that the cart badge displays the expected number of items.

kw.name: Open Cart
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Open the Shopping Cart page.

kw.name: Cart Page Should Be Open
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Verify that the Cart page is loaded successfully.

kw.name: Cart Should Contain Product
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'inventory_item_name')][text()='Sauce Labs Backpack']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Verify that the specified product is present in the cart.

kw.name: Close Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser after test execution. Test Teardown. Runs regardless of whether the test passes or fails.

test.doc: Verify that a user can add a product to the cart and view it successfully.

test.name: TC4 - Add Multiple Products And Verify Checkout Summary

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open the browser and navigate to the Sauce Demo application. Typically used as Test Setup.

kw.name: Login With Valid Credentials
Login With Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the username into the Username field.

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enter the password into the Password field.

kw.name: Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the Login button to submit the login form.
Perform login using the provided username and password.
Log in using the valid credentials stored in the configuration file.

kw.name: Products Page Should Be Visible
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify that the Products page is displayed after a successful login.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Add a product to the cart using the provided product button locator.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Add a product to the cart using the provided product button locator.

kw.name: Cart Badge Should Show
Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify that the cart badge displays the expected number of items.

kw.name: Open Cart
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Open the Shopping Cart page.

kw.name: Cart Page Should Be Open
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Verify that the Cart page is loaded successfully.

kw.name: Cart Should Contain Product
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'inventory_item_name')][text()='Sauce Labs Backpack']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Verify that the specified product is present in the cart.

kw.name: Cart Should Contain Product
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'inventory_item_name')][text()='Sauce Labs Bike Light']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Verify that the specified product is present in the cart.

kw.name: Proceed To Checkout
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the Checkout button to begin the checkout process.

kw.name: Fill Customer Information
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Enter customer details and navigate to the Checkout Overview page.

kw.name: Checkout Summary Should Contain Product
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'inventory_item_name')][text()='Sauce Labs Backpack']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Verify that the specified product appears in the checkout summary.

kw.name: Checkout Summary Should Contain Product
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'inventory_item_name')][text()='Sauce Labs Bike Light']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Verify that the specified product appears in the checkout summary.

kw.name: Checkout Item Count Should Be
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verify the total number of products listed in the checkout summary.

kw.name: Summary Quantity For Product Should Be
Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'cart_item')][.//div[text()='Sauce Labs Backpack']]//div[contains(@class,'cart_quantity')]' contains exact text '1'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify the quantity displayed for a specific product. Sauce Demo always displays quantity as 1.

kw.name: Summary Quantity For Product Should Be
Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://div[contains(@class,'cart_item')][.//div[text()='Sauce Labs Bike Light']]//div[contains(@class,'cart_quantity')]' contains exact text '1'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Verify the quantity displayed for a specific product. Sauce Demo always displays quantity as 1.

kw.name: Close Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser after test execution. Test Teardown. Runs regardless of whether the test passes or fails.

test.doc: Verify that multiple products can be added to the cart and correctly displayed during checkout.

suite.doc:
Sauce Demo Automation Test Suite (Task 20) Built using the Page Object Model (POM) design pattern.
This file contains NO locators. It only calls reusable keywords from page objects, making the test cases easy to read and maintain.
Test Cases Covered: 1. Valid Login 2. Invalid Login 3. Add Single Product to Cart 4. Multiple Product Checkout Verification
